# Kirka Community Hub
> Hub for Kirka.io customizations and community resources.

## Core Resources
- Assets: /pages/assets.html (Scripts, Skyboxes, Kill Icons, and Sounds)
- CSS Themes: /pages/css.html  (Free and Paidf themes for the Kirka)
- Crosshairs: /pages/crosshairs.html (Competitive crosshair overlays)
- Textures: /pages/textures.html (Custom map and weapon textures)
- Clients: /pages/clients.html (3rd party game clients for kirka)

## Community & Tools
- Tools: / (Includes Clan Manager and Data URI Converter)
- Social: Discord community for scrims and developer chat.
- Submission: /other-pages/submit-content.html (Community contribution portal)
